examples: After lunch there will be a walk in the grounds of the chateau to see the Jugendstil nymph fountains, a work dating from 1903 by Walter Schott.
The monumental building has beautiful Art deco and Jugendstil details.
They were fascinated by the closed white stucco facades and metal fences in Jugendstil design.
He had everyone laughing two years ago when he pronounced "Jugendstil" as "You could steal" and saluted the crowd when he got it wrong.
